title: Packet 031 Source Artifact Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
objective: Publish the validated Packet 031 two-file source artifact and required Packet 030 through Packet 034 authority surfaces through the parent-root boundary, then reconcile and resynchronize `/home/olares/code/apex` non-destructively to the published commit.
active_role: Olares Packet 031 Source Artifact Publication Gate Operator
dependency_note: Packet 034 confirmed the Packet 031 source artifact remains exact between host and workstation with diff SHA-256 `65882514ad1b609dcf5498ef23fbe18953e8f6e925e0170cb57c044809688f91`, passed canonical `pnpm --dir ... typecheck`, and passed canonical `pnpm --dir ... smoke:browser` through existing no-install workstation pnpm capability. Exact publication scope for the Packet 031 two-file source artifact and required Packet 030 through Packet 034 authority surfaces
constrained_outputs: A bounded parent-root publication commit containing only the validated source artifact and required authority surfaces
A dated publication and host-mirror resync handoff recording included paths, excluded paths, commit hash, host pre/post state, and byte-equivalence handling for the dirty host files
A clean synchronized `/home/olares/code/apex` only if it can be achieved by non-destructive byte-equivalence handling plus fast-forward-only sync

No unrelated `.vercelignore`, no install, no package or lockfile mutation beyond already validated source scope, no runtime mutation, no service mutation, no remote rewrite, no force/reset/clean, no AI-services rollout, no Gitea/code-hosting transition, no canonical-hosting transition, no migration approval, and no old-clone mutation
validation_steps: Review parent-root git status and define the minimum publication set; exclude unrelated `.vercelignore` and unrelated drift.
Reconfirm the workstation source diff hash and canonical validation evidence from Packet 034.
Reconfirm the host dirty source files still match diff SHA-256 `65882514ad1b609dcf5498ef23fbe18953e8f6e925e0170cb57c044809688f91` before publication.
Create a bounded parent-root commit for only the validated source artifact and required authority surfaces.
Publish the bounded commit through the existing canonical publication path without remote rewrite.
On `/home/olares/code/apex`, prove dirty source files are byte-equivalent to the published commit before any non-destructive reconciliation step.

Synchronize `/home/olares/code/apex` to the published commit using a fast-forward-only method and stop if force, reset, clean, remote rewrite, package mutation, runtime mutation, service mutation, or old-clone mutation would be required.
Record post-sync host cleanliness, commit, and authority artifact presence.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes no database writes and no runtime, service, package-manager, install, remote-rewrite, AI-services, Gitea, canonical-hosting, migration, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation. It authorizes only bounded publication of the validated source artifact and authority surfaces plus non-destructive host mirror resync.
closure_note: Not yet executed. Packet 035 is prepared because Packet 034 passed canonical typecheck and browser smoke for the mirrored Packet 031 source artifact.
next_action: Execute only after Packet 034 closure is accepted.
